title: Leaderboard Service with Go API & TypeScript CLI

steps.description:
Implement the full feature in main.go — single-binary go project

Feature requirements: build a Go REST API for a leaderboard service with a TypeScript CLI client that submits scores and displays rankings
steps.done_condition: main.go compiles and fully implements: build a Go REST API for a leaderboard service with a TypeScript CLI client that submits scores and displays rankings; go.mod has correct dependencies

riskRegister.mitigation: Implement connection pooling and retry mechanisms
Implement caching and optimize database queries
Define clear data validation rules and error handling
riskRegister.risk: Inconsistent data between API and CLI

successCriteria: Leaderboard service can store and retrieve scores
Leaderboard rankings are accurate and up-to-date
CLI client can submit scores and display rankings
